file.subject: Case O-117
file.summary: An observatory began receiving signals from 'future memory states.' All timestamps are internally consistent — no time travel occurred. Only interpretation mismatch across states.

records.label: Candidate causes
records.value: External interference / internal recursion / multi-iteration bleed

file.verdict: The signal is interpretation mismatch across coexisting states, not a transmission.
file.objective: Determine whether the signal is external interference, internal recursion, or multi-iteration bleed.
